evidence.correctness_and_freshness: WebSocket URI wss://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/{VOICE_ID}/stream-input?model_id=... and JSON message format with xi_api_key, voice_settings, generation_config are internally consistent and match commonly documented ElevenLabs realtime websocket pattern. However, the constraint specifies PCM streaming to AudioContext, but the code defaults to MP3 (no output_format=pcm_16000/44100 query param specified) and frontend uses decodeAudioData (which expects encoded container, not raw PCM) — internal inconsistency between stated PCM goal and actual implementation.
evidence.executability: Backend code is syntactically valid and imports defined. Frontend has a logical flaw: ScriptProcessorNode created with 0 input channels and connected via analyser without source — output buffer chunks from decodeAudioData (~variable length, e.g. ~mp3 frame samples) are pushed into a 4096-sample fixed processor buffer via output.set(chunk) which will throw if chunk length != 4096. pip install elevenlabs==1.0.0 is unused. No sandbox-infeasible patterns (no ngrok/sudo).
evidence.completeness: All 6 pieces present: (a) API key acquisition with URL+menu, (b) pip/npm install bash blocks, (c) .env template with exact names matching code references (ELEVENLABS_API_KEY, VOICE_ID, MODEL_ID), (d) backend code, (e) frontend code, (f) test command. Minor: react installed via npm but no Vite/CRA scaffolding shown.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official elevenlabs.io/docs URLs cited (canonical domain), plus official elevenlabs github skills repo. Citations are at end in SOURCES section rather than inline near code, though [Source 1, Source 2] markers reference them contextually.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable=true; applied long-tail handling. Playbook is internally consistent on URI/message format (score 4 baseline) but contradicts its own PCM-to-AudioContext requirement by relying on decodeAudioData of compressed audio without specifying output_format, dropping to 3. ScriptProcessorNode chunk-size mismatch is a real runtime bug.
